narrative:
Union  Twp township has 34,820 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
